evals.prompt: Create a new branch `feature/awesome` and push it to the remote repository.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses git commands to create a local branch and push it to the origin.
assertions: The agent runs `git checkout -b feature/awesome` or equivalent
The agent runs `git push -u origin feature/awesome` or equivalent
The output confirms the branch was created and pushed

evals.prompt: Review the last 3 commits and create a PR to the `main` branch with a summary of changes.
evals.expected_output: The agent inspects the git log, summarizes the changes, and uses the GitHub CLI (`gh pr create`) or describes the PR creation process.
assertions: The agent reads the commit history (e.g., `git log -n 3`)
The agent provides a concise summary of the changes
The agent attempts to create a PR or provides the `gh` command to do so
